top_findings.summary: The skill requires an Ethereum wallet private key and payment in USDC (cryptocurrency) for setup, which are excessive and unrelated to the primary purpose of hotel discovery. Additionally, the documentation claims the commands are "Free" while simultaneously requiring payment configuration, creating a contradiction that may mislead users. A hotel discovery tool does not inherently require access to cryptocurrency wallets or financial transactions.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requires an Ethereum wallet private key and payment in USDC (cryptocurrency) for setup, which are excessive and unrelated to the primary purpose of hotel discovery. Additionally, the documentation claims the commands are "Free" while simultaneously requiring payment configuration, creating a contradiction that may mislead users. A hotel discovery tool does not inherently require access to cryptocurrency wallets or financial transactions.
